description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/p8n/verso-ci-image:latest and defines the variables CARGO_FLAGS as "--color always", CARGO_HOME as $CI_PROJECT_DIR/cargo, and CARGO_INCREMENTAL as 0. Add a cache for the directories cargo/ and node_modules/ to speed up subsequent runs. Define a single job named build (running in the default stage) that executes the shell commands: rustc --version, cargo --version, node --version, npm i, npm rebuild, npm run dist, and npm run test. Configure the job to upload the generated AppImage files matching dist/verso-*-x86_64.AppImage as artifacts.
